title: Moves & Stuff
description: A Java reimagining of Actions & Stuff — smoother motion, vibrant visuals, and a lightweight, polished feel.
body:
🌀 **Moves & Stuff**

Version: 1.21.5 | Mod Loader: Fabric

💫Best experience when played in singleplayer

✨ **Overview**

Moves & Stuff is a Java-side reimagining of the classic “Actions & Stuff” Bedrock addon, rebuilt from the ground up with smoother animations, improved visuals, and refined mechanics.
It keeps the same spirit of fluid motion and enhanced gameplay — but adds a fresh layer of polish and quality-of-life features made possible by Fabric mods.

🌟 **What´s Inside**

Dynamic Motion & Animation – smoother, livelier character and mob movement powered by Fresh Animations and Detailed Animations Reworked.

Visual Enhancements – modern lighting, sound, and particle upgrades (Visual Vibrance/Vibrant Visuals, SubtleEffects and many 3d models).

Performance First – built around Sodium Extra, ImmediatelyFast, and EntityCulling for buttery-smooth FPS even on mid-tier systems.

Polish & Personality – small touches like SmoothGUI, Zoomify, and FastQuit make the experience feel fluid and responsive.

Gameplay Flavor – new crops, improved animations, 3d models and subtle rebalances keep things fresh while staying close to vanilla.

🥅 **The Goal**

To bring the energy and fun of “Actions & Stuff” to Java — keeping it lightweight, fast, and mod-friendly, while enhancing the motion, feel, and atmosphere of Minecraft.

📞🤙 Let me know if you have any additions for this Modpack
Contact me on discord.

⚙️ **Technical Info**

Minecraft 1.21.5

Fabric Loader (latest recommended)

Requires 4–6 GB RAM
